short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $17.23B in FY2026 Q1, +14.4% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $13.80B (-19.9% vs current Q) — set by 26 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $11.20.
Next earnings: 2026-07-14 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $60B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $56B → FY2 $60B (+6.2% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 35.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +22.3% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Financials): Rate-cycle position + capital-return runway define the 1-3 year setup.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 32.2% across 11 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 11 dates spanning 93–940 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±15.9% ($826.08 – $1138.16).
393-day implied move: ±33.8% ($650.46 – $1313.78) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $650 (-33.8% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-6.0pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 90-day cash-secured put at $913 (7% OTM). Uptrend + acceptable IV → income strategy with willingness to take ownership at lower cost basis. Roll if untested; assigned position becomes long-term hold.
